case_title: SANTOS, BRUCE vs. TSANGARES, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
APPLICATION & DECLARATION FOR JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FILED. STIPULATION SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES & FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSANGARES, WILLIAM DOES 1 THROUGH 5 $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,720.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $381.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,601.50, ATTNY FEES & COSTS AS TO WILLIAM TSANGARES ONLY.
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, BRUCE HEARING SET FOR APR-27-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 504
